page.title: Valentine's Day Yacht Charter in Marbella: A Romantic Escape at Sea

data.meta_description: Book a Valentine's Day yacht charter in Marbella from €749. Sail Puerto Banús with champagne, sunset views, and a private skipper. Reserve your romantic escape today.
data.summary: Celebrate Valentine's Day with a private yacht charter in Marbella, departing from Puerto Banús. Choose from our fleet of luxury boats starting at €749 for two hours, including skipper, drinks, and snacks.
key_facts: Charters start from €749 for 2 hours (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks.
Depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's glamorous marina.
Mangusta 80 (24m) available from €4,719 for 4 hours, includes a jet ski.
Maximum 12 guests on most yachts; ideal for intimate couples.
Sunset cruises to Cabopino or Estepona offer romantic coastal views.
Spanish IVA (21%) included in all prices—no hidden fees.
Book via WhatsApp for custom itineraries and Valentine's extras.

faq.q: What is included in a Valentine's Day yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). For a romantic touch, you can request champagne or a custom menu via WhatsApp.

faq.q: How much does a Valentine's Day yacht charter cost in Marbella?
faq.a: Prices start at €749 for two hours on an Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. For a larger experience, the Mangusta 80 costs €4,719 for a minimum of four hours and includes a jet ski. Other boats are priced on request.

faq.q: Which yachts are best for a romantic Valentine's Day charter?
faq.a: The Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) offers a spacious flybridge for sunset views. The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) adds luxury with a jet ski. For an intimate trip, the Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) or Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) are cosy options.

faq.q: Can I customise the itinerary for Valentine's Day?
faq.a: Yes, contact us via WhatsApp to tailor your route. Popular options include a sunset cruise to Cabopino, a stop at Cala del Faro for swimming, or a dinner charter near the Golden Mile. We can arrange flowers, chocolates, or a private chef.

faq.q: What is the best time of day for a Valentine's Day yacht charter?
faq.a: Sunset charters (typically 16:00–18:00 in February) are most romantic, with golden light over the Mediterranean and views of La Concha mountain. Evening charters under the stars are also popular.

faq.q: Do I need sailing experience to charter a yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: No, every charter includes a professional skipper who handles navigation. You simply relax and enjoy the experience. The skipper can also suggest the best spots for photos or swimming.

faq.q: How many guests can I bring on a Valentine's Day yacht charter?
faq.a: Most yachts accommodate up to 12 guests, perfect for a couple or a small group. The Dubhe and Mariah SX21 are smaller (5 pax each), ideal for an intimate two-person escape.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on Valentine's Day?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule your charter. February can be mild in Marbella, with average temperatures of 16°C.

data.body_html:
Skip the crowded restaurants this Valentine's Day and surprise your partner with a private yacht charter in Marbella. Departing from Puerto Banús, our fleet offers everything from intimate speedboats to superyachts, all with a licensed skipper, drinks, and snacks included. Prices start at €749 for two hours, and every booking includes Spanish VAT—no hidden costs. Whether you want a sunset cruise to Cabopino or a champagne toast near the Golden Mile, a boat rental in Marbella turns 14 February into something unforgettable.

Why Choose a Valentine's Day Yacht Charter in Marbella?

February in Marbella averages 16°C, with calm seas and clear skies—perfect for a coastal escape. A private yacht lets you avoid crowded restaurants and enjoy uninterrupted views of La Concha mountain and the Mediterranean. Our charters include a skipper, so you can focus on each other while cruising past landmarks like the Río Verde or Cala Cortés. For a truly bespoke experience, contact us via WhatsApp to add flowers, chocolates, or a custom menu.

Our Fleet for Valentine's Day

We offer a range of boats departing from Puerto Banús, each with a licensed skipper and all amenities included. Below are our top picks for a romantic charter:

BoatLengthMax GuestsPrice From
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2h
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2h
Azimut 58 Flybridge17.6m12On request
Mangusta 8024m12€4,719/4h
Speedboat7m6On request

For a sunset cruise, the Azimut 58 Flybridge offers a spacious upper deck. The Mangusta 80 includes a jet ski for added fun. Smaller boats like the Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) are ideal for couples wanting total privacy.

Romantic Itineraries from Puerto Banús

Our skippers know the Costa del Sol intimately. Popular Valentine's routes include:

  • Sunset to Cabopino: Cruise west along the coast, anchoring near Cabopino's dunes for a swim as the sun sets behind La Concha.
  • Estepona Escape: Head east to Estepona's marina, stopping at Cala del Faro for a quiet dip.
  • Golden Mile Glamour: Stay close to Puerto Banús, viewing luxury villas and the Marbella Club Hotel from the water.

All itineraries include soft drinks, beer, cava, and snacks. Upgrade to champagne or a gourmet picnic via WhatsApp.

What's Included in Your Charter

Every booking includes: a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No surcharges for weekends or holidays. The skipper can also recommend the best photo spots, like the iconic Puerto Banús entrance or the Marbella coastline.

How to Book Your Valentine's Day Yacht Charter

Reserving is simple. Browse our fleet on the Boat Rental Marbella site, then message us on WhatsApp with your preferred boat, date, and time. We'll confirm availability within hours. For the Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h) or other premium yachts, we recommend booking at least two weeks in advance. All prices include VAT—no surprises.

Tips for a Perfect Valentine's Day at Sea

  • Dress in layers: February evenings can be cool; bring a jacket or blanket.
  • Book a sunset slot: The best light is between 16:00 and 18:00.
  • Bring a camera: The views of La Concha and the Marbella coastline are stunning.
  • Request a special menu: We can arrange oysters, chocolate-covered strawberries, or a private chef.

Other Romantic Boat Options in Marbella

If our main fleet doesn't fit your plans, consider the Fairline Targa 12m (12m, 10 pax) or the Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax)—both available on request. For a larger party, the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) offers a jacuzzi and sundeck. Contact us for pricing and availability.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a Valentine's Day yacht charter in Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). For a romantic touch, you can request champagne or a custom menu via WhatsApp.

How much does a Valentine's Day yacht charter cost in Marbella?

Prices start at €749 for two hours on an Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39. For a larger experience, the Mangusta 80 costs €4,719 for a minimum of four hours and includes a jet ski. Other boats are priced on request.

Which yachts are best for a romantic Valentine's Day charter?

The Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) offers a spacious flybridge for sunset views. The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) adds luxury with a jet ski. For an intimate trip, the Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) or Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) are cosy options.

Can I customise the itinerary for Valentine's Day?

Yes, contact us via WhatsApp to tailor your route. Popular options include a sunset cruise to Cabopino, a stop at Cala del Faro for swimming, or a dinner charter near the Golden Mile. We can arrange flowers, chocolates, or a private chef.

What is the best time of day for a Valentine's Day yacht charter?

Sunset charters (typically 16:00–18:00 in February) are most romantic, with golden light over the Mediterranean and views of La Concha mountain. Evening charters under the stars are also popular.

Do I need sailing experience to charter a yacht in Marbella?

No, every charter includes a professional skipper who handles navigation. You simply relax and enjoy the experience. The skipper can also suggest the best spots for photos or swimming.

How many guests can I bring on a Valentine's Day yacht charter?

Most yachts accommodate up to 12 guests, perfect for a couple or a small group. The Dubhe and Mariah SX21 are smaller (5 pax each), ideal for an intimate two-person escape.

What happens if the weather is bad on Valentine's Day?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule your charter. February can be mild in Marbella, with average temperatures of 16°C.
